name: Assessment Advisor
description: Provides a comprehensive evaluation of an organization's data & AI landscape including sources, structure, usage and risks to build strategy, prioritize improvements, and align with business objectives and Data & AI Standards.
features: End-to-end data landscape and compliance & ethics alignment check
business_impact: Accelerates data strategy by revealing high-value assets, gaps, and investment priorities + ensuring organizations are technically, ethically, and operationally prepared to AI
use_cases: AI maturity assessment, data strategy evaluation, digital transformation readiness, AI governance audit, data landscape review, compliance alignment, investment prioritization

name: Data Health
description: Ensures data quality across systems with an end-to-end platform built to give you full control of your data from discovery to action with built-in compliance, automation and intelligence.
business_impact: Builds trust in analytics and AI by ensuring accurate, complete, and reliable data.
use_cases: data quality management, data validation automation, data monitoring, data reliability, data governance, ETL quality control, analytics data trust

name: Intelligent Analytics
description: Transforms raw data into actionable insights using ML, NLP and advanced statistical models, enabling proactive decision-making, uncovering hidden patterns in real time and explains results contextually.
business_impact: Enables faster, confident decisions by turning complex data into trusted, actionable intelligence.
use_cases: business intelligence, predictive analytics, real-time reporting, ML-driven forecasting, self-service analytics, KPI dashboards, data-driven decisions

name: ROI Simulator
description: Measures and communicates the business value of data and AI investments in financial and operational terms.
business_impact: Strengthens investment decisions by quantifying expected value and eliminating AI/data risk initiatives.
use_cases: AI investment ROI calculation, business case simulation, cost-benefit analysis, financial modeling, AI project justification, value quantification

name: AO Handler
description: An intelligent solution that discovers relevant public and private calls for tenders, evaluates eligibility based on predefined rules, and auto-generates compliant, tailored proposal drafts, accelerating bid cycles, reducing manual effort, and increasing win rates.
business_impact: Increases capacity and win rates while cutting response time and manual effort.
use_cases: tender management, bid automation, proposal generation, call for tender response, RFP automation, procurement automation, eligibility screening

name: AI Use Case Radar
description: A cross-industry intelligence tool that scans and prioritizes emerging AI trends and use cases to benchmark innovation and align strategy.
use_cases: AI trend scanning, use case prioritization, innovation benchmarking, AI opportunity identification, emerging technology radar

name: AI Implementation Framework
description: Provides a scalable, responsible, and business-aligned approach to developing, deploying, and monitoring AI/ML solutions.
use_cases: AI deployment methodology, responsible AI, MLOps framework, AI project governance, model monitoring, AI scaling

name: HR Assistant
description: A Conversational AI Assistant designed to interact naturally with users, understand intent, provide relevant responses, execute predefined tasks across multiple platforms and channels.
features: Integration with existing systems and sources (ERP, CRM, Databases)
business_impact: Enables natural, intelligent interaction with enterprise systems, reducing manual effort and improving employee experience.
use_cases: HR automation, recruitment process automation, CV triage, resume screening, candidate shortlisting, talent acquisition, hiring workflows, employee onboarding, leave requests, payroll inquiries, HR policy Q&A, people management automation

name: AI Workbench
description: A modular architecture designed to build, manage, and scale agent-based AI systems powered by LLMs. Enables users to interact with intelligent agents through a unified interface while allowing developers to integrate external tools, models, and services through MCP.
features: MCP server ecosystem for tool extensions
business_impact: Enables automation of complex tasks, rapid deployment of specialized AI agents, and integration with existing enterprise tools and data sources.
use_cases: AI agent development, LLM orchestration, multi-agent systems, enterprise AI platform, MCP tool integration, custom AI assistant building, agentic workflow automation

name: AI CV Sorter
description: An AI-assisted recruitment screening solution that ranks candidates against a job description, summarizes fit, highlights matched skills and gaps, and helps recruiters accelerate shortlisting decisions.
features: Job description to CV fit ranking
business_impact: Reduces manual screening time, improves shortlist consistency, and helps talent teams focus faster on the most relevant candidates.
use_cases: CV triage, resume screening, candidate ranking, candidate shortlisting, recruitment automation, hiring workflow optimization, talent acquisition, applicant screening, recruiter copilot
